differentials.name: left gonadal v./ a. [inferior mesenteric v.]

context: inferior left renal vein receives left gonadal vein + crosses aorta posteriorly 1-2 cm | small / equal-sized left IVC formed by left iliac vein | crossover to right IVC via left renal vein / or more inferiorly | crossover usually anterior / rarely posterior to aorta
